requirement_topic.en: South Korea Market Access — KC Mark, KATS/Designated-Body Certification, Importer of Record and K-REACH
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国市场准入——KC标志、KATS/指定机构认证、进口商主体及K-REACH
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國市場准入——KC標誌、KATS/指定機構認證、進口商主體及K-REACH

summary.en: Non-Korean manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the South Korean market must fulfil the following market access obligations: (1) KC Mark — affixed after completing the applicable conformity assessment under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act. Depending on the risk class, the route is KC Safety Certification (안전인증, the highest tier — type test plus factory inspection), Safety Confirmation (안전확인, declaration with a designated-lab test report), or Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (공급자적합성확인). Lithium secondary cells and battery packs fall under mandatory KC Safety Certification. (2) Importer / responsible operator — there must be a Korea-established certificate holder or importer of record responsible for the KC certification and for market-surveillance cooperation; a foreign manufacturer typically certifies through a Korean importer or appointed agent. (3) Chemical registration — substances may require registration/notification under K-REACH, administered by the Ministry of Environment. (4) Resource circulation / RoHS-equivalent and, where applicable, energy efficiency grade labelling via KEA/KEMCO apply to certain electrical products. Testing is performed by KATS-designated bodies (KTC / KTL / KTR).
summary.zh: 非韩国制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放韩国市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）KC标志——在完成《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》下适用的合格评定后粘贴。视风险类别不同，路径分为KC安全认证（안전인증，最高级别——型式检测加工厂检查）、安全确认（안전확인，凭指定实验室检测报告进行声明）或供应商符合性确认（공급자적합성확인）。锂二次电芯及电池组属于强制性KC安全认证。（2）进口商/责任运营商——须有在韩国设立的证书持有人或进口商主体，负责KC认证并配合市场监督；外国制造商通常通过韩国进口商或指定代理进行认证。（3）化学品注册——化学物质可能须依据由环境部管理的K-REACH进行注册/申报。（4）资源循环/RoHS等效，以及适用时经KEA/KEMCO的能效等级标签，适用于某些电气产品。检测由KATS指定机构（KTC/KTL/KTR）执行。
summary.zht: 非韓國製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放韓國市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）KC標誌——在完成《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》下適用的合格評定後粘貼。視風險類別不同，路徑分為KC安全認證（안전인증，最高級別——型式檢測加工廠檢查）、安全確認（안전확인，憑指定實驗室檢測報告進行聲明）或供應商符合性確認（공급자적합성확인）。鋰二次電芯及電池組屬於強制性KC安全認證。（2）進口商/責任運營商——須有在韓國設立的證書持有人或進口商主體，負責KC認證並配合市場監督；外國製造商通常通過韓國進口商或指定代理進行認證。（3）化學品註冊——化學物質可能須依據由環境部管理的K-REACH進行註冊/申報。（4）資源循環/RoHS等效，以及適用時經KEA/KEMCO的能效等級標籤，適用於某些電氣產品。檢測由KATS指定機構（KTC/KTL/KTR）執行。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KC Safety Certification / Safety Confirmation / Supplier's Declaration tiers (KATS / MOTIE)
KC 62133 — safety standard for lithium secondary cells and battery packs
Act on Registration and Evaluation of Chemical Substances (K-REACH) — Ministry of Environment
Act on Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles — RoHS-equivalent
Energy Use Rationalization Act — energy efficiency grade labelling via KEA / KEMCO where applicable

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). However, CCC certification is a Chinese domestic market requirement and is NOT recognised by South Korea; it does not substitute for the KC Mark. Chinese manufacturers do not need to appoint a Korean importer of record or certificate holder for domestic Chinese sales. There is no Chinese equivalent of the Korean KC certificate-holder/importer obligation, the K-REACH chemical registration regime, or KC tiered conformity assessment for exporters. China has its own chemical and recycling rules for domestic use that differ structurally from Korea's.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。然而，CCC认证属于中国国内市场要求，不被韩国认可，不可替代KC标志。中国制造商在国内销售时无需任命韩国进口商主体或证书持有人。对于出口商，中国没有等同于韩国KC证书持有人/进口商义务、K-REACH化学品注册制度或KC分级合格评定的对应制度。中国有其用于国内的化学品及回收规则，在结构上与韩国存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。然而，CCC認證屬於中國國內市場要求，不被韓國認可，不可替代KC標誌。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需任命韓國進口商主體或證書持有人。對於出口商，中國沒有等同於韓國KC證書持有人/進口商義務、K-REACH化學品註冊制度或KC分級合格評定的對應制度。中國有其用於國內的化學品及回收規則，在結構上與韓國存在差異。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in South Korea
PRC Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (2011, amended 2019) — domestic recycling rules
PRC Measures for Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order 12) — domestic chemical regime

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to South Korea face four structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) a Korea-established certificate holder or importer of record to hold the KC certification and cooperate with market surveillance — a foreign manufacturer cannot self-place on the Korean market without this; (2) mandatory KC Safety Certification (안전인증) including type testing to KC 62133 by a KATS-designated body and an initial factory inspection — distinct from any Chinese certificate; (3) K-REACH chemical registration/notification obligations where substances are in scope; (4) the KC Mark plus Korean-language labelling and, for some electrical products, RoHS-equivalent and energy efficiency grade labels. CCC certification (Chinese domestic) is not transferable. Total compliance cost may include designated-lab testing fees, factory inspection costs, importer/agent fees, and any K-REACH registration fees.
gap.zh: 向韩国出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临四项在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）须有在韩国设立的证书持有人或进口商主体持有KC认证并配合市场监督——外国制造商无此则不能自行投放韩国市场；（2）强制KC安全认证（안전인증），包括由KATS指定机构依据KC 62133进行型式检测及初始工厂检查——与任何中国证书不同；（3）适用时的K-REACH化学品注册/申报义务；（4）KC标志加韩文标签，以及部分电气产品的RoHS等效及能效等级标签。CCC认证（中国国内）不可转移。合规总成本可能包括指定实验室检测费、工厂检查费用、进口商/代理费及任何K-REACH注册费。
gap.zht: 向韓國出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨四項在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）須有在韓國設立的證書持有人或進口商主體持有KC認證並配合市場監督——外國製造商無此則不能自行投放韓國市場；（2）強制KC安全認證（안전인증），包括由KATS指定機構依據KC 62133進行型式檢測及初始工廠檢查——與任何中國證書不同；（3）適用時的K-REACH化學品註冊/申報義務；（4）KC標誌加韓文標籤，以及部分電氣產品的RoHS等效及能效等級標籤。CCC認證（中國國內）不可轉移。合規總成本可能包括指定實驗室檢測費、工廠檢查費用、進口商/代理費及任何K-REACH註冊費。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — KC Mark under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, a Korea-established certificate holder / importer of record, KC Safety Certification (안전인증) to KC 62133, and K-REACH registration where in scope apply before Korean market placement; RoHS-equivalent and energy efficiency labelling apply to certain electrical products
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of a Korean certificate holder / importer of record, KC tiered certification, or K-REACH registration required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address four market access obligations before South Korean market entry: the KC Mark under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, a Korea-established certificate holder or importer of record, KC Safety Certification (안전인증) to KC 62133 via a KATS-designated body with factory inspection, and K-REACH registration where chemicals are in scope. A Korean importer or appointed agent typically carries the certificate-holder responsibility. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Korean requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入韩国市场前，须应对四项市场准入义务：依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC标志、在韩国设立的证书持有人或进口商主体、由KATS指定机构进行并含工厂检查的依据KC 62133的KC安全认证（안전인증），以及化学物质在范围内时的K-REACH注册。韩国进口商或指定代理通常承担证书持有人责任。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何韩国要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入韓國市場前，須應對四項市場准入義務：依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC標誌、在韓國設立的證書持有人或進口商主體、由KATS指定機構進行並含工廠檢查的依據KC 62133的KC安全認證（안전인증），以及化學物質在範圍內時的K-REACH註冊。韓國進口商或指定代理通常承擔證書持有人責任。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何韓國要求。

source.publisher: KATS — Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (MOTIE)
